sections.middle: When you play this Pokémon from your hand onto your Bench, you may put 2 Basic Pokémon (except for Dragonite-EX) from your discard pile into your hand. Ability: Pull Up Hyper Beam 130 Discard an Energy attached to your opponent's Active Pokémon.
sections.bottom: weakness ×2 resistance -20 Pokémon-EX rule When a Pokémon-EX has been Knocked Out, your opponent takes 2 Prize cards. Illus. Ryo Ueda ©2016 Pokémon 106/108
